query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_linked_generations,
  SUM(CASE WHEN mg.audioUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS gen_also_dead,
  SUM(CASE WHEN mg.audioUrl NOT LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%' AND mg.audioUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS gen_potentially_live
FROM tracks t
JOIN musicGenerations mg ON t.musicGenerationId = mg.id
WHERE t.audioUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%';

  SUM(CASE WHEN mg.audioUrl NOT LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%' AND mg.audioUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS gen_potentially_live
FROM tracks t
JOIN musicGenerations mg ON t.musicGenerationId = mg.id
WHERE t.audioUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%';
